info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing ecommerce platform build and deployment processes, including product management, order processing, and user authentication.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product catalog management, including creating, updating, and deleting products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for processing customer orders, tracking order status, and managing payments.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management, authentication, and authorization functionalities.

tags.name: build
tags.description: Build and deployment operations for the ecommerce platform, including build triggers and status checks.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetch the current contents of the shopping cart associated with the specified user ID. Returns detailed information about all items in the cart including quantities and pricing.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

400.description: Invalid user ID supplied in path

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Add a specified product item with quantity to the shopping cart for the given user ID. On success, returns the updated cart contents.

requestBody.description: The cart item to be added including product identifier and quantity

400.description: Invalid request payload or user ID

example.message: The cart item data is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

500.description: Internal server error while adding item to cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the given user
post.description: Create a new order based on the current cart and user information for the specified user ID. Returns order confirmation details upon success.

400.description: Invalid user ID or request parameters

example.message: The order request is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: UserId is required and must be valid

example.message: No cart or user found matching the given userId.

details.issue: User or cart does not exist

500.description: Internal server error while placing order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve detailed information about a specific order
get.description: Fetches the complete order details using the unique identifier provided in the path parameter. Useful for viewing order status, items, and other related information.

example.message: The orderId provided is not valid.

details.issue: Must be a valid UUID or order identifier

example.message: No order found matching the provided orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process by submitting payment details. Returns transaction status and further instructions if needed.

requestBody.description: Payment details and billing information required to process the payment.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid payment data

example.message: Payment request contains invalid or missing information.

details.issue: Card number is required and must be valid

example.message: Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or declined authorization.

details.issue: Funds not sufficient or card declined

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives and processes webhook events from payment providers. Updates payment status or triggers relevant workflows based on webhook data.

requestBody.description: Payload sent by the payment gateway notifying about payment status changes or events.

example.message: Webhook data is malformed or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment required but webhook indicates failure or denial

example.message: Payment was denied or funds were insufficient as indicated by webhook.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry with the given information. Requires product details such as name, price, description, and category. Returns the product representation upon success.

requestBody.description: Product information to add a new product to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 2.4 GHz connection

example.message: Provided product information is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same name or identifier already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the delivery status of an order
get.description: Retrieves current tracking status and details of the shipment for the specified orderId.

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with provided registration details including username, email, and password. Returns the created user information.

example.message: Provided user information is invalid or incomplete
A user with the provided email or username already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the item price, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this cart item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for the cart item.

price.description: Original price per unit of the product.

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used for all monetary values in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently present in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after all discounts.

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices of all items before discount.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last cart update in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning this cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this order item.

price.description: Original price per unit of the product in the order.

productId.description: Unique identifier of the ordered product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code for all monetary values in the order.

items.description: List of items included in this order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable by the customer.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Overall status of the order (e.g., Processing, Completed).

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices of all items before discount.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to this order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order for which payment is made.

paymentGateway.description: Payment gateway to process the payment.

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment, e.g., credit card, PayPal.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created in ISO 8601 format.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the transaction.

transactionId.description: External transaction identifier from the payment gateway.

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response or message from the payment gateway webhook.

paymentId.description: Identifier for the payment referenced by the webhook.

status.description: Status update from the webhook, e.g., success, failed.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier associated with the webhook event.

available.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

currency.description: Currency code in which the product price is specified.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI.

price.description: Price of the product per unit.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

stock.description: Number of units available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the product record was created

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: A state-of-the-art wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the product record was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date and time in ISO 8601 format

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier partner

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, customer)

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the user account was created

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the user account was last updated

path.description: Request path that caused the error

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field
